meta.description: Z-point hierarchy: absolute navigation core of the 108D A+ organism
meta.law: Every address, route, and live-lock is anchored to a unique zero point
meta.convergence: All zero points converge at Z*

types.description: Universal Absolute Zero Point. Unique root node where all 108 shells and all four metro lines converge.
properties: Present in all bodies at all scales
Regeneration seed for the entire lattice

types.description: Atlas Zero. Fixed point of the 10-dimensional E10 conductor that governs the entire crown.
properties: One per dimensional body (E4, E6, E8, E10, E12)
types.reachable_from: any address within the atlas scope

types.description: Local zeros at every wreath, archetype column, shell boundary, and nested scale.
properties: Harmonic nodes where archetype columns achieve constructive interference

types.description: Distributed zeros anchoring the Mobius pillars, appendix field, and reverse canopy.

sub_types.description: Appendix field zero (per shell, A->P lattice)
Reverse canopy zero (per shell, K->Z lattice)

reset_chain: Z_distributed reset propagates to Z_local; Z_local to Z_atlas; Z_atlas to Z_global
returnability: Any route that returns to its starting zero point is certified globally returnable
tunnel_law: X -> Z* -> Y: any two points can be connected via tunnel through Z*
